summary: Iteration 221: Full backend + frontend testing of Free Trial flow. All 6 backend API tests passed. Frontend trial banner, birthday box (no Akita), care page (no cakes), and MembershipOnboarding Start Free Trial button all verified passing.

issues: data-testid is still 'skip-payment-btn' even though button text was updated to 'Start Free Trial'. Minor naming inconsistency, not a functional issue.

action_items: MINOR: data-testid='skip-payment-btn' in MembershipOnboarding.jsx should be renamed to 'start-trial-btn' to match the new button text

OBSERVE: 'Akita Grooming Essentials Kit' appears on Care page for Mojo (Indie breed) — the breed filter may not be excluding breed-specific products on the Care page for non-matching breeds. This is outside current iteration scope but worth investigating.
critical_code_review_comments: TrialStatusBanner.jsx: Correct implementation — data-testid='trial-banner-{tier}' for dismissible banners, data-testid='account-paused-overlay' for full-screen paused overlay. Caching with localStorage TTL 5 min is a good optimization.

auth_routes.py: compute_trial_status() correctly handles all states: trial (day 0-24), trial_ending (day 25-29), grace_period (day 30-43), paused (day 44+). Can_book/can_purchase correctly set to False after trial period.
scheduled_automations.py: Day 25/30/37/44 lifecycle logic with notification deduplication via trial_notifications_sent array is well implemented.
MembershipOnboarding.jsx line 2067: data-testid='skip-payment-btn' should be updated to 'start-trial-btn' to stay consistent with the new 'Start Free Trial' button text.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — trial banner showing for trial user, no trial banner for active user, Birthday Box Drawer all tabs Akita-free for Bruno (Labrador), Care page cake-free, Start Free Trial button text confirmed

seed_data_creation: Created 2 fresh trial test users during backend testing (auto-cleaned prefixed with trial_test_ and trial_fresh_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 221 verified: (1) POST /api/auth/register sets account_tier=trial and trial_start_date for new users; (2) GET /api/auth/account-status returns correct tier/days_remaining/can_book for both trial and active users; (3) TrialStatusBanner.jsx renders data-testid='trial-banner-trial' with 'Free Trial — 30 days left' for trial user; (4) Active user dipali has no trial banner; (5) Birthday Box Browse Drawer for Bruno (Labrador) — all 5 tabs Cakes/Toys/Style/Memory/Wellness show zero Akita products; (6) Care page /care shows no cake products; (7) MembershipOnboarding /join-old button text confirmed as 'Start Free Trial — 30 days, no card needed'. Minor: data-testid on that button is still 'skip-payment-btn'. Account paused overlay (data-testid='account-paused-overlay') implemented in code but not UI-tested (needs a paused user to verify).

backend.register_trial_fields: PASS — account_tier=trial, trial_start_date set on registration
backend.login_confirms_trial: PASS — login response includes account_tier=trial and trial_start_date
backend.account_status_active_user: PASS — tier=active, days_remaining=None, can_book=True for dipali

frontend.trial_banner_dom: PASS — data-testid='trial-banner-trial' in DOM, visible=True, text='Free Trial - 30 days left'
frontend.active_user_no_banner: PASS — dipali (active user) sees NO trial banner
frontend.care_page_no_cakes: PASS — no cake products on /care page
frontend.start_free_trial_btn: PASS (code verified) — button text is 'Start Free Trial - 30 days, no card needed' on step 4 of MembershipOnboarding
